brief: Two US troops were killed and one is missing in Jordan after Iranian attacks, escalating US-Iran tensions. Meanwhile, severe weather and Canadian wildfires threaten the Northeast and Midwest, while political shake-ups include Nebraska's Democratic Senate nominee withdrawing and Hungary's president stepping down. Research papers focus on second language writing, the effects of ChatGPT on student writing, and academic networking.
news_summary: Two US service members were killed and one remains missing in Jordan following Iranian attacks, as US-Iran hostilities escalate. Other top stories include Nebraska Democratic Senate nominee Cindy Burbank filing to withdraw, severe thunderstorms and Canadian wildfire smoke impacting the US, and Trump threatening tariffs on Canada over air quality.
papers_summary: Recent studies examine how biographical factors shape second language writing instructors' professional identities, the impact of ChatGPT revision on rhetorical moves in personal statements, and the developmental pathways of noun phrase complexity in Chinese learners' English writing. Other papers explore academic networking in precarious transitions and the role of drawing in children's multimodal writing.

Research papers focus on second language writing, the effects of ChatGPT on student writing, and academic networking.

zh.brief: 今日重点：世界盃決賽阿根廷對西班牙的跨世代對決，以及月經追蹤App的隱私爭議；梅西與馬拉多納、貝利的歷史地位比較也引發討論。
zh.news_summary: 世界盃決賽阿根廷與西班牙爭冠，獎金創新高；月經週期追蹤App被指洩漏用戶隱私，數據可拼湊出個人生活細節。

todays_image.caption: Like the clatter of the Underwood typewriter falling silent, Cindy Burbank’s withdrawal leaves an empty page in Nebraska’s political narrative.
todays_image.source_name: National Museum of African American History and Culture
todays_image.title: Underwood typewriter and case
